name: Read env var with default + cast
task: Create /tmp/eval_env/env.py with get_env(name, default=None, cast=str). Reads os.environ.get(name); returns default if missing; otherwise applies cast() and returns its result. If cast() raises ValueError or TypeError, return default.

validation.script: import importlib.util,os; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_env/env.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); G = mod.get_env; os.environ['TEST_X'] = '42'; assert G('TEST_X', cast=int) == 42; assert G('TEST_NOPE', default='hi') == 'hi'; os.environ['TEST_X'] = 'abc'; assert G('TEST_X', default=99, cast=int) == 99; del os.environ['TEST_X']; print('OK')
